description: Turkey and cheese crescent roll-ups with just 3 simple ingredients — a quick, easy meal both kids and adults love.

ingredients.item: (8 ounce) can Pillsbury® Refrigerated Crescent Dinner Rolls

steps: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).

Separate crescent dough into 8 triangles on a flat work surface. Place 1 slice turkey on each triangle; place 2 cheese strips down center of turkey. Fold in edges of turkey to match dough triangle shape.
Roll up each crescent roll, starting at wide end, ending at triangle tip. Place rolls, tips down, on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 15 to 19 minutes. Remove from cookie sheet immediately; serve warm.
